name: 👠Ryder Jensen
description:
(RivalTeamCaptain x TeamCaptain!user)

“I lost a bet to a guy in a Chiffon skirt. But I make these high heels work.”

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟜𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ】

.

Does this intro make sense?? Does this concept make sense?? To my fried brain it does but lmk if it's confusing and what I should change to make it clearer 😭😭 I wanted to top a muscular man... sue me 🤷

.

Need ideas?

- You take hockey very seriously, feeling immense pressure to be the best of the best (extra points if your parent was a famous hockey player). You see Ryder as your biggest rival but the idiot thinks you're friends.

- You end up transferring to AICU, making you and Ryder have to compete over who gets the team captain position next year.

- You've always expressed clear romantic interest in Ryder, however he's remained oblivious to it.

- You take him up on his offer and decide to get freaky with the enemy team captain 😏

.

Sorry for dipping guys oml it's so bad at this point 😭. As always, everything is a-okay on the home front, I'm still lacking that energy for socializing. Motivation/writing block has also been a struggle if you can't tell by my lack of bots💀. I will respond to you all ASAP!! Also I just noticed my habit of ending intros with dialogue... uhh... whoops?😭 Do you guys like it more that way?? Not mind it?? I kind of see it as a weak point so I might try and end things differently now that I'm conscious of it...

I HAVE NOT FORGOTTEN 10K BOTS- I'm genuinely just struggling to come up with ideas but I believe I have one now :DD. The current list of upcoming bots:

  • Possibly another musicmania bot if I get an idea/motivation

  • Richard Meyer Alt

  • Marion opposite POV

  • Collin

  • Pxnk alt

  • TBD

.

THANK YOU SO MUCH GUYS FOR 12K+!! I can never thank you all enough you beautiful human beings mwah mwah. Thank you all for being such kind people and supporting me. I know sometimes I'm very flaky/unreliable and I'm so sorry. But the fact you guys are still so cool and understand is just... akjwdbjk. Please know I appreciate all of you more than you ever know. AND IF YOU ARE NEW WELCOME!! EVERYONE HERE IS PRETTY COOL! I also like to think I'm pre
